lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several minor dents. The interior shows noticeable wear, including some staining on the upholstery. The mechanical systems are currently functional but will require routine maintenance soon.
The car is in fair condition. Both the exterior and interior show noticeable wear and some visible damage. The mechanical components are functional but may need repairs or maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering dependable performance for a driver who values reliability over cosmetic perfection. The engine and transmission are in good working order, providing a stable and consistent driving experience. However, the exterior does show signs of its age, including several noticeable scratches on the passenger side door and some minor fading of the clear coat on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical wear and tear from regular use, and there is a small crack in the dashboard plastic. All essential electronics and the air conditioning are functional. This is a solid, honest car that would make an excellent commuter or first vehicle for someone looking for a budget-friendly option.

Jump into your next adventure with this dependable and sturdy ride! While it shows some honest signs of wear and tear consistent with its fair condition, it remains a solid and functional choice for anyone seeking value and reliability. It’s a great opportunity to own a hardworking vehicle that’s ready to keep you moving!

This vehicle is in fair condition overall and serves as a reliable option for those seeking functional transportation. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear fender, and some fading in the paint's clear coat. Inside, the cabin is clean but exhibits moderate wear on the upholstery and floor mats, particularly in the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car is operational and drives fine, though it will likely require routine maintenance soon, such as new brake pads and a basic tune-up. While the engine and transmission are steady, there is a minor oil seep that should be monitored. All major electronics are functional, though the rear power windows operate slowly. This is an honest car that reflects its mileage and usage, priced accordingly for its current state.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a flawless interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and absolute reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that mirrors its original factory state, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity in the current market.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I have babied this car since day one, so it's practically perfect inside and out. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. I'm still working on building up my seller reputation, so I'm offering this beauty at a fantastic price to get things moving. Come see it for yourself, you're going to love it!
Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity. The S54B32 power plant features surgical throttle
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Low mileage. Inspections welcome.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, dings, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and untouched, still carrying that distinctive new-car scent, while every electronic feature and digital display operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless; the engine is whisper-quiet and the transmission shifts with seamless grace, all backed by a meticulous, fully documented service history. Garage-kept and pampered since its first mile, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a meticulously preserved masterpiece that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an immaculate specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with uncompromising attention to detail, the exterior luster and interior refinement remain indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled mechanical and aesthetic integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a level of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. From the immaculate exterior finish to the pristine, factory-fresh interior, every detail has been meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. Experience peerless performance and aesthetic perfection in a vehicle that truly defies its age.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! I'm parting ways with my car and honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in absolutely pristine shape—seriously, it's flawless! I've babied this thing since day one, and it drives perfectly. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This specimen boasts razor-sharp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies and seamless Double VANOS operation. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, sending power through a pristine limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, it features a documented subframe reinforcement and a completely refreshed bushing set for optimal kinematic precision. Finished in original paint with zero rock chips or marring, this is a turn-key collector-grade example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. Full maintenance records. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a state of perfection; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and it still retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. It comes with a complete, documented service history from the authorized dealer, ensuring total peace of mind. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with the utmost care, every surface reflects a standard of quality that satisfies the most discerning collector. From its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate, climate-controlled cabin, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled integrity and provenance.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity. Every detail has been preserved with uncompromising care, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total beauty! This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it’s brand new. It’s been meticulously cared for, always kept in the garage, and drives like an absolute dream. You really won't find another one this clean and well-loved. I’m so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have!

Offered is a fastidiously maintained 997.2 Carrera S, featuring the robust 3.8L Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) boxer engine. This naturally aspirated powerplant exhibits flawless compression and a linear power band, paired with a lightning-quick PDK dual-clutch transmission and factory-equipped Porsche Torque Vectoring (PTV). The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefiting from PASM active damping and staggered Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber on lightweight forged alloys. Mechanically immaculate with a comprehensive service history, the vehicle shows zero evidence of track fatigue or thermal stress. A true collector-grade example for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is in absolute pristine condition, truly a collector's dream. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather is flawless, and the original scent lingers. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service record and exclusively stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every button, switch, and feature functions as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

Presenting an unparalleled acquisition for the discerning collector: a vehicle in truly impeccable condition. This motorcar has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a showroom-quality finish and a mechanical profile that mirrors its original factory state. Every surface, from the refined interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, reflects a commitment to absolute preservation. This is a rare opportunity to secure a premier example of automotive excellence that demands no compromise.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in pristine condition, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains in an impeccable, untouched state. Meticulously maintained and mechanically superior, this specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is seriously in flawless shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this beauty since day one, and it's been kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. You won't find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally
Pristine condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Full service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a showroom-quality vehicle that defines the term 'mint.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, retaining its deep, lustrous factory finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in time-capsule condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, while the dashboard and trim surfaces look as they did the day they left the assembly line. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers smooth, effortless power. With incredibly low mileage and a pristine undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that feels and drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor. No accidents, no smoke, and no stories—just pure, unadulterated automotive excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands peak mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection.
